name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Poachers will win if this bill passes
body:
Petition: Tell Congress to stop H.R. 2603.
=================================
TAKE ACTION NOW: https://secure.awf.org/dems-stop-HR2603?utm_campaign=fy18democrats&ms=B18Q09E03M&utm_source=1710dems1&utm_medium=email
=================================
Urgent: Congressional Bill HR 2603 guts the most basic protections of the Endangered Species Act for any species not native to the U.S. It's shocking because Americans like you have made one thing clear: Elephants, apes, rhinos, and other wildlife should be protected, not come under further threat.

We need 35,000 advocates like you to sign our petition today telling Congress to stop this disastrous bill!
=================================
TAKE ACTION NOW: https://secure.awf.org/dems-stop-HR2603?utm_campaign=fy18democrats&ms=B18Q09E03M&utm_source=1710dems1&utm_medium=email
=================================
-- The African elephant: VULNERABLE
-- The bonobo: ENDANGERED
-- The black rhino: CRITICALLY ENDANGERED
=================================
TAKE ACTION NOW:
=================================
STOP H.R. 2603

Tell Congress to protect Africa's wildlife - help us reach our goal of 35,000 signatures
=================================
TAKE ACTION NOW: https://secure.awf.org/dems-stop-HR2603?utm_campaign=fy18democrats&ms=B18Q09E03M&utm_source=1710dems1&utm_medium=email
=================================
They're calling it the SAVES Act, but the only things this bill saves are wildlife traffickers' profits. It's up to us to halt this bill right now and tell Congress we care about Africa's wildlife - help stop H.R. 2603 today.
=================================
TAKE ACTION NOW:
=================================
The African Wildlife Foundation (AWF) is the leading international conservation organization focused solely on Africa. We believe that protecting Africa's wildlife and wild landscapes is the key to the future prosperity of Africa and its people -- and for over 50 years, we have made it our work to help ensure that Africa's wild resources endure.
=================================
DONATE: https://secure.awf.org/membership?utm_campaign=fy18democrats&ms=B18Q09E03M&utm_source=1710dems1&utm_medium=email
=================================
Donate with Confidence

Better Business Bureau Accredited Charity | http://www.give.org/charity-reviews/national/environment/african-wildlife-foundation-in-washington-dc-283

Charity Navigator 4 Star Charity | http://www.charitynavigator.org/index.cfm?bay=search.summary&orgid=3219#.VlNhcOK19Fs

CharityWatch | https://www.charitywatch.org/ratings-and-metrics/african-wildlife-foundation/237
=================================
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/AfricanWildlifeFoundation

Twitter | https://twitter.com/AWF_Official

Google+ | https://plus.google.com/+AfricanWildlifeFoundation

Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/africanwildlifefoundation
=================================
African Wildlife Foundation
1100 New Jersey Ave SE, Suite 900 Washington, DC 20003
Phone: 1-888-494-5354
=================================
Website | http://www.awf.org?utm_campaign=fy18democrats&ms=B18Q09E03M&utm_source=1710dems1&utm_medium=email

Support Us | https://secure.awf.org/membership?utm_campaign=fy18democrats&ms=B18Q09E03M&utm_source=1710dems1&utm_medium=email

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMjA0LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMTUxNzc1OTI2

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Join Us at Kirk Cameron's REVIVE US 2 Live Oct. 24th
body:
Having trouble viewing this email? [Click Here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Freviveus.com%2F_newsletters%2Foct5%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=1) | [](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Freviveus.com%2Ftickets%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=2)
---
[Do You Have Your Tickets Yet?](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Freviveus.com%2Ftickets%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=3) Last year’s national meeting of the family of faith inspired and encouraged believers. This year, Kirk Cameron and his guests are focusing on unity, hope, and courage. You have just two opportunities to be part of **REVIVE US 2** , a special event in theaters across the nation: LIVE on Tuesday, October 24 or the encore on Wednesday, November 1. [](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Freviveus.com%2Ftickets%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=4)
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Freviveus.com%2Fguests%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=5)
[Ravi Zacharias and the Idea of Right and Wrong](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Freviveus.com%2Fguests%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=6) One of Kirk’s guests at **REVIVE US 2** is Ravi Zacharias. When he speaks around the world, people take notice ... “These days it's not just that the line between right and wrong has been made unclear; today Christians are being asked by our culture today to erase the lines and move the fences. And if that were not bad enough, we are being asked to join in the celebration cry by those who have thrown off the restraints religion had imposed upon them. It is not just that they ask we accept, but they now demand of us to celebrate it too.” [](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Freviveus.com%2Fguests%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=7)
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fkirkcameron%2Fvideos%2F10155736034938735%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=8)
[Help Launch Revive Us 2](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.reviveuslaunchteam.com%2F%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=9) If you were part of **Revive Us** , Kirk needs your help. Speak into **REVIVE US 2** by joining the Launch Team for the event. [](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.reviveuslaunchteam.com%2F%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=10)
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FReviveUsEvent%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=11)[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Freviveusevent&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=12)[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fchannel%2FUCTm2qBIlANPij_mbN-E5-3w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=13)[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Freviveusevent%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=14)
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.reviveuslaunchteam.com%2F%3Futm_source%3Dreviveus2_eblast%26utm_campaign%3Doct5%26utm_medium%3Demail&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=15)
| ©2017 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171009_ru_s1&n=16). This email may contain links to, or advertisements concerning, other third party sites. Provident Films is not responsible for the privacy practices or content of such other sites and encourages you to read their own privacy statements and terms of use when you visit such sites. © 2017 Provident Films LLC, A Unit of SONY MUSIC ENTERTAINMENT. All Rights Reserved.

One of Kirk’s guests at REVIVE US 2 is Ravi Zacharias. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: VP under fire for standing for 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The media is NOT going to win this fight. |
---
| | | | | | | | [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00cc3b9dbef8770a106e9f4d72db436fef20031044423a2d02f5c4bfd780e0dddddfbbf7ab4e4069898)
---

Peter,

Yesterday members of the San Francisco 49ers took a knee during our National Anthem. Their stunt showed the world that they don't believe our flag is worth standing for.

But your Vice President REFUSED to dignify their disrespect for our anthem, our flag, and the many brave soldiers who have died for their freedoms.

Peter, I was so proud of the Vice President.

**But immediately after the Vice President 's honorable display of leadership and patriotism, the Fake News Media relentlessly ATTACKED him.**

The media is NOT going to win this fight, because we have the AMERICAN PEOPLE standing on our side.

---
| **[Please make a contribution of at least $5 to show your support, and our team will send you an"I STAND FOR THE FLAG" sticker.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00c2759e16e56eeabf356e8629d841f8d72a9fb140d074a45c2e04e226ca99d2c4429ca1ea7780e05d2)**

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00c8300fa8d0fc9238d2caf0953dd292fe018e20741471dd4bd19f26a1d3db21fa4e43b0282fc195834) [CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00c3228b308af221a540a2f9fe8f2d446296dd25865ae06b84257481e4f5ee0f0cdcbc48dab6c6e4a91) [CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00cf30274faf9ba5017857a27f43900db69fa5beb96f58c46198a3de2a61a8d51fc6c8762b2223014ca) [CONTRIBUTE $75](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00c77345bd9adda7cce08c7695cc6fcb7e80261c22be6458a52bcbd8ea3e4a32a646b6c4857b0882c5d) [CONTRIBUTE $50](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00cebbea13330101650d62d17fae0aaf75aa1805a2e056482cd5ab595a80a93d7d37e42f6bf9b64e027) [CONTRIBUTE $35](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00cba8cdbb56ae795ef72393a25cbc1e48da6acd998a5fe6d14d10ea8c23decf7642ba4348f1c17b1ea) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c53ac2cc59f7a00c5138da3db5920d677c29bc4595c855fb43ee3d3101adeda0572259087d9424b5889a79389666ecd7)
Thank you and God bless the USA - the greatest country in the world!

name: DWS
subject: here he goes again
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Tensions with North Korea are higher than they've been in decades. An unprecedented humanitarian disaster is unfolding in Puerto Rico as millions are still without reliable access to food and water. And what is the President doing? You guessed it -- **tweeting.** Trump's Twitter usage is making things worse and distracting from the real issues. [_**Enough is enough: demand Trump delete his Twitter account and get back to work.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0c/622b7b5b/661b7e2/307bd343/1549619910/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171007") When Puerto Rico needed emergency relief in the aftermath of Hurricane Maria, the President was focused on ... the NFL. | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0c/622b7b5b/661b7e2/307bd343/1549619910/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171007")
---
Instead of offering support and information on how to help, he directed his efforts to attacking Puerto Rican officials on the front line of relief efforts.
[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0c/622b7b5b/661b7e2/307bd343/1549619910/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171007")
---
Rather than tactfully managing tensions with a nuclear-armed North Korea, he implied that military force was the only option.
[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0c/622b7b5b/661b7e2/307bd343/1549619910/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171007")
---
[_**President Trump 's Twitter usage is becoming one of our country's biggest liabilities. It's time to put down the phone and delete the account, Mr. President. Sign on if you agree.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0c/622b7b5b/661b7e2/307bd343/1549619910/VEsD/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171007")
Thank you,
Debbie
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0c/622b7b5b/661b7e2/307bd342/1549619910/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---
clean_body: | | | | | Tensions with North Korea are higher than they've been in decades. An unprecedented humanitarian disaster is unfolding in Puerto Rico as millions are still without reliable access to food and water. And what is the President doing? You guessed it -- tweeting. Trump's Twitter usage is making things worse and distracting from the real issues. "" When Puerto Rico needed emergency relief in the aftermath of Hurricane Maria, the President was focused on ... the NFL. | "" Instead of offering support and information on how to help, he directed his efforts to attacking Puerto Rican officials on the front line of relief efforts. "" Rather than tactfully managing tensions with a nuclear-armed North Korea, he implied that military force was the only option. "" "" Thank you, Debbie Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: We can't believe we're talking about THIS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde7d/2a380d31/1d14cef0/fe00c8/2467735724/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde7d/2a380d31/1d14cef0/fe00c8/2467735724/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
It's alarming that this needs repeating in 2017, but a woman's health care decisions belong to her and her doctor -- not her employer, not Congress, and certainly not Donald Trump.
Yet Donald Trump and his administration have decided that revoking access to birth control is one of the most pressing issues of our time.
In a blatant attack on women's rights, Donald Trump just rolled back an Affordable Care Act requirement that employers include birth control coverage in their health insurance plans.
We just looked -- you haven't yet signed our online petition to tell the Trump administration to protect access to birth control and women's health care. [**We 're still short of the 10,000 signatures we need, so will you put your name down now?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde7d/2a380d31/1d14cef0/fe00c9/2467735724/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20171005_ProtectBirthControl?source=e20171009_birthcontrol2_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Nine out of ten women of reproductive age will use contraception at some point in their lives. _Nine out of ten._ And since this benefit went into effect, women across the country have saved $1.4 billion on birth control.
Taking away this benefit undermines women's access to important health services, and it's critical that we all speak out against it. That's why we're asking you to please sign our petition to protect access to birth control and health care: [**http://act.maggiehassan.com/protect-birth-control**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde7d/2a380d31/1d14cef0/fe00c9/2467735724/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20171005_ProtectBirthControl?source=e20171009_birthcontrol2_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thanks for making your voice heard,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde7d/2a380d31/1d14cef0/fe00ca/2467735724/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxN19iaXJ0aC1jb250cm9sIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzEwMDlfQmlydGhDb250cm9sMl9hY3QiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2017_birth-control?refcode=e20171009_BirthControl2_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde7d/2a380d31/1d14cef0/fe00cb/2467735724/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**

In a blatant attack on women's rights, Donald Trump just rolled back an Affordable Care Act requirement that employers include birth control coverage in their health insurance plans. We just looked -- you haven't yet signed our online petition to tell the Trump administration to protect access to birth control and women's health care. name: LAST CHANCE (via DSCC)
subject: Where should we ship your tote bag, team? (orders closing)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We're closing online orders on our "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag in 48 hours.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171009-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

**We 're closing online orders on our "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag in 48 hours.**

Our limited-edition tote bag not only shows the world what you stand for, but it helps the Women's Senate Network re-elect a HISTORIC number of women to the Senate.

**[So before we close the books on this order, claim your Women's Senate Network tote bag with a gift of $35 or more today! Get yours now (FREE shipping!) >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171009-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171009-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Last week was an important reminder of why we need more women in the Senate.

When the Trump administration announced that they were going to roll back birth control access it was Senators like Kirsten Gillibrand who immediately spoke out and said "This shouldn't have been up for debate in the first place. We'll fight back."

But Kirsten is one of the TEN Democratic female Senators up for re-election this cycle. And we're already seeing vicious attack ads being aired against the likes of Claire McCaskill, Tammy Baldwin, and Elizabeth Warren. At a time when we need more women in the Senate standing up to Trump, we can't afford to take a single race for granted. We've got to help our female Senators fight back.

[**So team, can we count on you to help AND score your very own "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag today? Order yours (before time runs out!) >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171009-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for standing with us,

Team DSCC

P.S. Already ordered a tote bag? Don't worry! We are processing your order. [**You can click here to order a second tote bag now.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171009-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dee4/2b07114c/efc59d80/731519a0/3361175866/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dee4/2b07114c/efc59d80/731519a3/3361175866/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dee4/2b07114c/efc59d80/731519a2/3361175866/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Victory against dark money in CA!
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Huge news! California’s governor just signed the landmark,
first-in-the-nation campaign disclosure legislation called the
California DISCLOSE Act.

This vital bill requires ballot measure ads and independent
expenditure ads for or against candidates to clearly and prominently
disclose the identity of their top three funders -- even if they hide
behind multiple layers of front groups.

This is a huge step forward for the legitimacy of elections in
California and our efforts to keep dark money out of elections
everywhere in America.

It only affects one state today, but it can now serve as a model for
the entire country.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1262?t=1002&akid=322%2E356062%2EJaHXmR ]Contribute $3 today to help LegitAction keep
organizing for more victories nationwide in the fight against dark
election money.

Thousands of Legit members in California signed petitions and made
phone calls to help advance this groundbreaking law. And every Legit
member around the country who’s already made a contribution to support
our work had a hand in this win, too.

In many ways, this victory parallels my work with Senator McCain on
campaign finance reform. This achievement was seven years in the
making, just like the McCain-Feingold campaign finance reform bill.

And just like that earlier bill, this one passed with a bipartisan
majority -- after facing criticism from even some of those on the
left.

This achievement shows why we can’t sit back and wait for others to
push for reform. It had to be us, and it worked. When we act together,
we have a lot of power. We know we can make more progress -- because
we just did.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1262?t=1003&akid=322%2E356062%2EJaHXmR ]Contribute $3 today to help LegitAction keep
organizing for more victories against dark money in elections. Let’s
start spreading California’s new model nationwide.

The assault on the legitimacy of our elections started well before
President Trump, and it will continue long after he’s gone. But we now
know we can make a difference right now, state-by-state.

Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy,

Russ Feingold

P.S. This achievement shows that when we work together, we have a lot
of power. We know we can make more progress -- because we just did.
[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1262?t=1004&akid=322%2E356062%2EJaHXmR ]Contribute $3 today to help.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/1262?t=1005&akid=322%2E356062%2EJaHXmR ]CONTRIBUTE »

Authorized and paid for by LegitAction, Inc.

All content © 2017 LegitAction, Inc., All Rights Reserved

LegitAction, Inc
PO Box 620061
Middleton, WI 53562

[ https://act.legitaction.com/signup/privacy-policy/?t=1001&akid=322%2E356062%2EJaHXmR ]Privacy Policy

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.legitaction.com/cms/unsubscribe/legitaction_unsubscribe/?akid=322%2E356062%2EJaHXmR
